definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="198" y="160"><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">mob_settings</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">tracker_spawn</field><field name="comment">Whether the Tracker spawns</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">tracker spawn</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">flying_tracker_spawn</field><field name="comment">Whether the only Flying Tracker spawns</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">flying tracker spawn</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">flying_tracker_break_block</field><field name="comment">Whether the flying tracker breaks blocks</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">flying tracker break block</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">hyper_mob_spawn</field><field name="comment">Whether the Hyper Mob spawns. If you disable Hyper Mob spawning, Super Mobs will not appear either</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">hyper mob spawn</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">game_play_settings</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">machine_particle</field><field name="comment">Whether the particle from machines</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">machine_particle</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">always_allow_nether</field><field name="comment">Whether the allow Nether always</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">always allow Nether</field><field name="value">false</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">always_allow_end</field><field name="comment">Whether the allow End always</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">always allow End</field><field name="value">false</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">can_start_extreme</field><field name="comment">Whether the can start extreme</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">can start extreme</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">can_get_em_loot</field><field name="comment">Whether can get Em loot when Extreme mode off</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">can get EM loot when off extreme mode</field><field name="value">false</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
